## YOLO Edition checklist

- [ ] This change is specific to the AGPL-3.0 YOLO Edition.
- [ ] This change is compatible with AGPL-3.0 distribution.
- [ ] This change is not intended to be merged back into the Apache-2.0 Core Edition.
- [ ] If this PR syncs from Core Edition, the upstream commit SHA is documented.
- [ ] If model files changed, their source, version, license, redistribution terms, and commercial-use terms are documented.
- [ ] Release notices were updated if this affects distributed builds.
